title: MS_Meteorites
description: A Fabric mod that introduces meteorites with visual effects including sky flashes and particle trails, destructive impact mechanics, and three cooling stages of meteorite blocks.
body:
---

# 🌠 Meteorites

**Meteorites** brings fiery space rocks crashing into your Minecraft world - complete with cinematic effects, realistic physics, and massive craters that reshape the land.

---

## ✨ Features

### ☄️ Meteorite Events

* **Realistic physics** - custom flight paths and descent angles for each meteorite
* **Spectacular visuals** - glowing particle trails in multiple sizes streaking across the sky
* **Block destruction** - meteorites smash through terrain as they fall
* **Forced chunk loading** so meteors never vanish mid-flight
  ![falling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BsTMpdFA/images/273ca53069aedb1b272275f033e8bac7cf34b099.png)

---

### 🌋 Dynamic Crater Generation

* **Massive, irregular craters** formed on impact
* **Multi-layer destruction** that digs deep into the ground
* **Terrain carving** respects block hardness for natural results
* **Underground cavities** form beneath major impact sites
  ![cooling meteorite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f23470e4a1b596ac95f19c69adaa3837e236f41_0.webp)

---
